message.content:
CRITICAL AUDIT: Compare the service and repository files between card-place source and rewardprogram target.

Source files (card-place):
- ~/dev/rnm-app-fintech-card-place/src/newArch/store/rewardProgram/services/airlineMiles.service.ts
- ~/dev/rnm-app-fintech-card-place/src/newArch/store/rewardProgram/services/parameter.service.ts
- ~/dev/rnm-app-fintech-card-place/src/newArch/store/rewardProgram/services/permission.service.ts
- ~/dev/rnm-app-fintech-card-place/src/newArch/store/rewardProgram/repository/parameter.repository.ts
- ~/dev/rnm-app-fintech-card-place/src/newArch/store/rewardProgram/repository/permission.repository.ts

Target files (rewardprogram):
- ~/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/services/services/airlineMiles.service.ts
- ~/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/services/services/parameter.service.ts
- ~/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/services/services/invoicesCashbackPermission.service.ts
- ~/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/services/repository/parameter.repository.ts
- ~/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/services/repository/invoicesCashbackPermission.repository.ts

For each file pair:
1. Read both files completely
2. Compare the business logic - method implementations, data transformations
3. Report ANY differences in:
   - Method names
   - Method signatures
   - Business logic
   - Data transformations
   - Error handling
4. List ONLY import path changes (these are allowed)
5. Flag any logic changes as CRITICAL

Output format:
## [filename]
- Logic changes: [NONE/list changes]
- Import path changes: [list]
- Status: ✅ MATCH / ❌ LOGIC CHANGED
